allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([i['name'] for i in d['instructions']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pkgs=d.get\('packages',{}\); [print\(k,'→',v.get\('version'\)\) for k,v in pkgs.items\(\) if 'anchor' in k.lower\(\) or 'coral' in k.lower\(\) or 'magicblock' in k.lower\(\) or 'ephemeral' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; vs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([v for v in vs if v.startswith\('0.3'\) or v.startswith\('1.'\)][-10:]\)")
